# Known orphaned version tags — OUTSTANDING DEBT, NOT AN ALLOWLIST
#
# Every tag listed here points at a commit that is NOT an ancestor of main.
# They are exempt from G4 (scripts/check-tag-ancestry.py) only because they
# predate that guard. Resolving an orphan requires deleting/re-cutting the
# remote tag, which is a force operation on shared history and therefore an
# OPERATOR decision — it is deliberately not automated.
#
# RULES
#   * Adding a line here is NOT a way to silence G4. A new orphan means a tag
#     was mis-pushed; fix the push, do not extend this file.
#   * G4 fails if a tag here is no longer orphaned, so the list must SHRINK as
#     debt is repaid. It can never rot into a blanket exemption.
#
# Format:  vX.Y.Z  # reason
#
# Snapshot taken against main = 3827d172 (2026-07-21), 574 tags, 5 orphans.

v11.16.0  # historical: cut from a branch commit that never landed on main
v11.20.0  # historical: release bump lost to a rebase collision
v14.1.1   # historical: cut from a branch commit that never landed on main
v14.1.2   # historical: cut from a branch commit that never landed on main
v20.0.90  # pushed by NAME from the shared local tag namespace; resolves to
          # d3686e7b7 on the unmerged branch behind PR #710. Clears itself when
          # that PR merges — no operator action needed if it lands.
